name: Adhikram Maitra
summary:
I launched my career as a Founding Backend Engineer, architecting the digital backbone for an Ed-tech startup that scaled to 10,000 users in just three months.

Hungry for the accountability of massive scale, I pivoted into Data Engineering, where I built high-performance systems at Media.net, processing 3 billion rows of data and slashing latency by 50%.

Leveraging that technical grit, I helped build a SaaS tool from the ground up, scaling it from zero to $20,000 in monthly revenue.

Now, I’m at the frontier of the AI Domain, engineering agentic RAG layers and AI-native outreach funnels that empower the Real Estate industry to make data-driven decisions and close million-dollar deals at scale.

skills.title: Languages
skills.details: Python, JavaScript, Scala, Java, SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Ruby, C++

skills.title: Backend \& Frameworks
skills.details: Node.js, Ruby on Rails, Next.js, Express, REST APIs, Microservices

skills.title: Cloud \& DevOps
skills.details: AWS, EC2, EMR, SQS, Azure, Docker, Jenkins, Git, Nginx, Redis

skills.title: Databases \& Data Engineering
skills.details: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Spark, Kafka, Structured Streaming, HDFS, Hive, PySpark, ETL, Data Modeling

skills.title: AI \& Machine Learning
skills.details: Agentic AI, Multi-LLM Integration, LLM Fine-Tuning, Prompt Engineering, Vector Databases, RAG

skills.title: Analytics \& Monitoring
skills.details: Metabase, Data Pipelines, A/B Testing, Performance Monitoring, Real-time Analytics

skills.title: Software Engineering
skills.details: Design Patterns, OOP, Distributed Systems, System Architecture, Algorithms
